member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleDto
member.summary: Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a vehicle. Used to expose vehicle information from the ApplicationCore layer to the API or microservice clients.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Id.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleDto.Model
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Model.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleDto.Plate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Plate.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleDto.ManufactureDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Manufacture Date. Only vehicles with a maximum age of 5 years are allowed.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto
member.summary: Data Transfer Object (DTO) to rent or return a vehicle. Contains both the vehicle identifier and the user's DNI.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique rental identifier.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.VehicleId
member.summary: Gets or sets the vehicle being rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.Dni
member.summary: Gets or sets the user identifier (DNI) renting the vehicle.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.RentDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the vehicle was rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Api.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.ReturnDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the vehicle was returned. Null by default, indicating the vehicle is still rented.
